metadata.title: Services
metadata.description: Explore premium website, RAG chatbot, and app development services for modern businesses.

hero.title: Digital systems designed for growth
hero.description: We design and build premium websites, grounded AI assistants, and custom applications that support real business outcomes.

cards.title: Premium Website Building
cards.summary: Corporate and brand websites with multilingual support and conversion-focused structure.

cards.title: RAG Chatbots

cards.title: App Development

metadata.title: Premium Website Building
metadata.description: High-end business websites designed for trust, conversion, and long-term brand growth.

hero.title: Premium websites built to perform
hero.description: Strategic and visual execution for businesses that need both credibility and conversion.

whoFor.title: Who this is for
items: Businesses upgrading from outdated websites
Brands preparing for multilingual expansion
Teams that need better conversion structure

problems.title: What problems it solves
items: Unclear positioning and weak first impression
Inconsistent UX across desktop and mobile
Sites that are hard to maintain or scale

included.title: What is included
items: Discovery workshop and page architecture
Premium UI system and responsive implementation
Technical SEO foundations and launch checklist

timeline.title: Typical timeline
items: Week 1-2: Strategy, content direction, and structure
Week 3-5: Design and iterative implementation
Week 6: QA, launch prep, and handoff

engagement.title: Engagement model
engagement.description: Project-based delivery with weekly decision checkpoints and direct founder collaboration.

cta.title: Plan your premium website build
cta.description: Share your business goals and we will scope the right execution path.

metadata.title: RAG Chatbots
metadata.description: Grounded business assistants that turn documents and internal knowledge into reliable answers.

hero.title: Grounded AI assistants for real business use
hero.description: We transform your knowledge base into searchable, context-aware AI assistants for customers and teams.

whoFor.title: Who this is for
items: Teams handling repeated customer or internal questions
Businesses with extensive documentation or SOPs
Organizations preparing AI-enabled service workflows

problems.title: What problems it solves
items: Slow and inconsistent responses to common questions
Knowledge buried in files and disconnected channels
AI answers that are generic or not trustworthy

included.title: What is included
items: Knowledge source mapping and retrieval strategy
RAG pipeline setup and answer behavior tuning
Admin flow for updates and operational continuity

timeline.title: Typical timeline
items: Week 1: Knowledge audit and use-case definition
Week 2-4: Retrieval design and assistant build
Week 5: Testing, guardrails, and deployment

engagement.title: Engagement model
engagement.description: Phased implementation with measurable milestones and optional post-launch optimization support.

cta.title: Build a reliable AI assistant
cta.description: Let us map your knowledge sources and define a grounded assistant strategy.

metadata.title: App Development
metadata.description: Custom web applications for internal operations, client workflows, and scalable digital products.

hero.title: Custom apps aligned with your operations
hero.description: From internal tools to client portals, we build practical systems that support growth and control.

whoFor.title: Who this is for
items: Businesses replacing manual spreadsheet workflows
Teams building client-facing digital services
Founders validating product ideas with execution speed

problems.title: What problems it solves
items: Operational friction across disconnected tools
Lack of visibility over tasks, approvals, or reporting
No scalable foundation for future product growth

included.title: What is included
items: Workflow discovery and system requirements definition
Core module build with role-based access design
Roadmap recommendations for phase two expansion

timeline.title: Typical timeline
items: Week 1-2: Discovery, scope, and architecture decisions
Week 3-8: Core feature implementation and QA
Week 9: Launch support and performance tuning

engagement.title: Engagement model
engagement.description: Milestone-based build with direct communication and transparent prioritization.

cta.title: Build your custom digital product layer
